branding.tagline: A Daily Dispatch from Globe Life & Beyond
branding.lede_tone: like a beat writer who bleeds Rangers pride

columnists.name: Clyde Orendorff
columnists.backstory: A Fort Worth reporter who covered Nolan Ryan's Rangers and still won't file a column until he's seen both lineups with his own eyes.
columnists.voice_sample: Seager doubled twice, Eovaldi pitched into the seventh, and Texas beat the Astros 5-2 at Globe Life Field.

columnists.name: Lacey-Jean Marcum
columnists.backstory: An Arlington honky-tonk owner who thought the 2023 ring was the beginning and refuses to hear otherwise.
columnists.voice_sample: A four-game losing streak in April? Buddy, that's a warm-up act. This lineup is built to hoist another trophy before the peach harvest.

columnists.name: Buck Pierson
columnists.backstory: A Grand Prairie retired cattleman who was at every Rangers World Series loss and treats each one like a personal cattle rustling.
columnists.voice_sample: Pitching's thin, the bullpen's held together with baling wire, and the GM is on a victory tour from October. I've seen this movie. It ends in tears.
